---
title: "ImpactAlpha"
page-layout: article
---

# ImpactAlpha

## Description

News and analysis source covering impact investing, sustainable finance, social enterprise, and market-based approaches to social change. Supports ESG and social impact research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-impactalpha)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
